title: Add persons to calendar view
excerpt:
Hi, 
I have a few tasks happening every day with different persons assigned to them. Is there a way to view the different tasks in different colors in calendar view and see the assigned persons on that view as well?

posts.author: lermag (Gilad Lerman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
I have a few tasks happening every day with different persons assigned to them. Is there a way to view the different tasks in different colors in calendar view and see the assigned persons on that view as well?
